hero.description: We reinvented video conferencing for your local network. Secure, fast, and free.

secure.title: Secure by design
secure.description: Your meetings stay on your local network

fast.title: Ultra-fast
fast.description: Minimal latency on your local network

connection_status.action_backend: Check that the backend is running

notes.title: Personal Notes
notes.placeholder: Write your personal notes here... They will not be shared with others. They are saved temporarily during this session.

info.code_participants: Participants will be able to join with this code
info.create_or_generate: Create a custom code or generate one automatically
info.auto_id: A unique ID will be generated automatically

errors.enter_code: Please enter a code or generate one automatically
errors.name_taken: This meeting name is already in use. Please choose another.
errors.id_taken: This meeting ID is already in use. Please try again.
errors.generic: An error occurred while creating the meeting.

info.enter_id: Enter the ID of the meeting you want to join

errors.name_taken_in_room: This name is already used in this meeting.
errors.room_not_found: The meeting does not exist or is no longer available.

active_rooms.title: Active Meetings
active_rooms.start_new: Create a new meeting to start
active_rooms.toast_name_required: Please enter your name in the form above first

server_popup.title: Server Connection Lost
server_popup.subtitle: Unable to communicate with the server

steps.1: Check that the backend server is running
steps.2: Click the button below to connect to the server
steps.3: Accept the SSL certificate if asked
steps.4: Come back to this page to continue

modal.leave_desc: Are you sure you want to leave this meeting? Your camera and microphone will be disabled immediately.
modal.end_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently end this meeting? All participants will be disconnected.

errors.share: Unable to share screen. Please try again.
errors.admin_only: Only the administrator can end the meeting

controls.kicked_toast: You have been removed from the meeting by the administrator.

participants_list.title: Participants
participants_list.kick_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from the meeting?

chat_box.title: Meeting Chat
chat_box.file_too_large: The file is too large. Maximum size: 50 MB
chat_box.send_error: Error sending file. Please try again.

step1.title: Welcome to LOCAL MEET 👋
step1.subtitle: Let me show you around the home page!

create.title: Create a meeting
create.desc: Click this tab to create a new meeting room.
create.form_desc: Fill in your name, the meeting name, then click "Start meeting" to instantly launch your room.

code.title: Meeting code
code.desc: Generate a random code or set a custom one. Share it with participants so they can join directly.

join.title: Join a meeting
join.desc: Click here to switch to "Join", then enter the meeting code to instantly join an existing room.

header.title: Meeting room 🎥
header.desc: This is your meeting room. The room name, number of participants, and connection status are displayed here.

participants.title: Participants panel
participants.desc: Click this button to open the participants list and see who is connected to the meeting.

chat.title: Meeting chat
chat.desc: Open the chat to send messages and files. You can also reply to specific messages, like on WhatsApp!

notes.title: Personal notes
notes.desc: A private notepad visible only to you. You can export your notes as a .txt file before the meeting ends.

controls.title: Media controls
controls.desc: Turn your microphone, camera, and screen sharing on/off. The red button lets you leave (or end) the meeting.
